description: Graphic styled as a screenshot of a Truth Social post from Donald J. Trump. At the top left is a circular profile avatar showing a face painted in the colors of the American flag (one half blue with white stars, one half red and white stripes). Next to it is the black display name 'Donald J. Trump' followed by a magenta verified checkmark badge and a small black square badge. Below the name is the grey handle '@realDonaldTrump'. The body is black sans-serif text on a white background reading verbatim: 'For Iran, the Clock is Ticking, and they better get moving, FAST, or there won't be anything left of them. TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE! President DJT'. The background is plain white.
notable_text: For Iran, the Clock is Ticking, and they better get moving, FAST, or there won't be anything left of them. TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE! President DJT
